    Talon Baker - Software Engineer

    Programmer · Game Designer · Artist
    UCSC Computer Science: Game Design. I build games, shaders, AI agents, and software — then draw things.

    // Projects // Art

    Games & VR

    Shipped a VR cooperative game on Steam. Grand Prize at the UCSC Games Showcase. Producer & Programmer on a 12-person team.

    View Projects →

    Graphics & Systems

    OpenGL, WebGL, GLSL shaders, Three.js — plus AI agents, C++ data structures, and C# tools.

    View Projects →

    Producing & Design

    Produced a campus-wide ARG at UC Santa Cruz. Designed and shipped 6+ digital and analog games.
